race.description: Swan Draught Wa Day Cup Hcp (66+)
race.comment: ASTRO WORLD (13) just missed fresh before a big win last start at Belmont when the race favourite, storming over the top to win. A wet deck won't matter and she gets into this race right down in the weights. Pike sticks with her and she can repeat the dose. FIRST ENCOUNTER (5) just missed fresh when on the speed as the race favourite, caught at the death. Martinan's claim comes in handy here and he maps to get every chance. The soft track suits and he can put his best foot forward. CORRECT CHOICE (9) is third-up now and looks well suited with Parnham replacing the apprentice. DONT WAIT FOR LUCK (10) is in winning form and can't be left out of calculations stepping out to the mile.
